about.title: About Central do Grid
about.subtitle: A hub built for F1 fans to follow the sport with context, premium visuals, and simple navigation.
about.project: The project keeps mock data in separate files to make future integration with APIs like OpenF1 or Ergast easy.

footer.disclaimer: Independent fan site. Not affiliated with Formula 1, FIA, or teams.
